title: Asukas Instrumentality Suit Not THAT one
display_title: Asukas Instrumentality Suit Not THAT one
wikitext:
[]: Asuka's Instrumentality Suit (Not THAT one)             Quote Post by NightComesOn » Mon Sep 12, 2022 7:18 pm During Asuka's flashback to her training days, we see her walking down a hallway directly toward the "camera" past other NERV(?) staffers. In this one shot, she's wearing a suit unlike any of the plugsuits, presumably for some kind of simulator. Is there an agreed-upon name for this suit, and is there any other art or merch depicting it?

[]: Re: Asuka's Instrumentality Suit (Not THAT one)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Sep 15, 2022 12:31 pm AFAIK the only thing we ever saw was this from Yamashita: The katakana say "plug suit", maybe someone can read the kanji. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: Asuka's Instrumentality Suit (Not THAT one)             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Thu Sep 15, 2022 3:50 pm If there's any better name for it, it's likely to be in the second volume of Thrice Groundworks once it releases.

[]: Re: Asuka's Instrumentality Suit (Not THAT one)             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Thu Sep 15, 2022 6:19 pm It’s refered as a “training plugsuit”, more precisely: “Asuka training era plugsuit” (アスカ訓練時代プラグスーツ)
